title: Federal Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Federal Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
